option.t-att-selected: 'selected' if b03dn_selected_company_id and c.id == b03dn_selected_company_id else None
'selected' if b03dn_selected_template_id and tpl.id == b03dn_selected_template_id else None

select.name: b03dnMoneyUnit
select.title: Scale displayed amounts (screen; printing uses the line below)
